title: NESG Board Visits President Bola Tinubu
description: Earlier today, the Board of Directors of the Nigerian Economic Summit Group led by the Chairman, Mr Niyi Yusuf met with the President of the Federal Republic of Nigeria, Bola Tinubu GCFR to discuss ec
html:
Earlier today, the Board of Directors of the Nigerian Economic Summit Group led by the Chairman, Mr Niyi Yusuf met with the President of the Federal Republic of Nigeria, Bola Tinubu GCFR to discuss economic matters and the upcoming 29th Nigerian Economic Summit (NES #29).

The 29th Nigerian Economic Summit with the theme “Pathways to Sustainable Economic Transformation and Inclusion” will hold on October 23 to 24, 2023.
